notes: temperature/humidity/pressure I2C breakout — general robotics I/O teaching, not something an antweight combat robot needs. Reports three independent live readings from one physical part (see `readings`), not a single collapsed number.
description: An environmental sensor: ambient temperature, humidity, and pressure, all from one physical part. Not a combat-robot part — included for general robotics I/O practice, the same I2C-bus shape as a ToF or IMU.
